records.stderr_pattern: forked VM terminated without properly saying goodbye|exit value 137|Process .* finished with non-zero exit value 137
records.description: Maven/Gradle test fork killed (signal 137) — increase heap and timeout

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "The forked VM terminated without properly saying goodbye. VM crash or System.exit called?" >&2; echo "Process Exit Code: 137" >&2; exit 1'
